name: parallel-audit
description: Multi-agent parallel audit of agent-instruction markdown files (CLAUDE.md / CLAUDE.local.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md / SKILL.md) for HIGH-severity quality issues. Dispatches N independent subagents (default 3), keeps only findings flagged by at least threshold (default 2), classifies redundancy, then proposes targeted fixes with per-fix user approval. Event-driven diagnostic for post-refactor verification, ignored / drifted rules, or pre-shipping checks — not for routine maintenance.
